titleZh: 《公司法》修订对“董监高”合规义务和风险的重大影响
titleEn: Major Impacts of the Company Law Revision on the Compliance Duties and Risks of Directors, Supervisors and Senior Management
abstractZh: 围绕新《公司法》对董事、监事和高级管理人员忠实义务、勤勉义务、资本催缴责任、关联交易和责任追究规则的集中强化，提供企业内部治理和合规应对视角。
abstractEn: Explains how the revised Company Law reshapes duties, liability exposure, capital-call responsibilities, and related-party compliance obligations for directors, supervisors, and senior officers.
